leadText: If you were looking for the Awakening Emera in Pokémon Super Mystery Dungeon, see Emera. The Awakening (Japanese: ねむけざまし Drowsiness Cure) is a type of medicine introduced in Generation I. It can be used to wake a Pokémon from sleep.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] When used from the Bag on a Pokémon, it cures a Pokémon from sleep , or, in Pokémon Legends: Z-A , drowsy .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Stad Awakens a Pok é mon that has fallen asleep. G S C Awakens sleeping Pok é mon . R S E Colo XD Awakens a sleeping Pok é mon . FR LG A spray-type medicine. It awakens a sleeping Pok é mon . D P Pt HG SS B W B2 W2 A spray-type medicine. It awakens a Pokémon from the clutches of sleep. X Y OR AS S M US UM A spray-type medicine used against sleep. It can be used once to rouse a Pokémon from the clutches of sleep. P E Sw Sh BD SP LA A spray-type medicine to wake the sleeping. It can be used to rouse a single Pokémon from the clutches of sleep. S V A spray-type medicine to wake the sleeping. It can be used to rouse a Pokémon from the clutches of sleep. ZA A spray-type medicine to wake the sleeping. It can be used to rouse a Pokémon that is feeling drowsy.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Conq. Cures sleep.

Wonder Launcher [ edit | edit source ] The Awakening appears as a Wonder Launcher item. It costs 4 points to use.
